title: JSON Document
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a JSON document that also conforms to the JSON Schema specification. The `json-schema` tag signals that the payload can be used to validate other JSON documents, not merely that it is valid JSON itself.

## When to use
Use `media:json;json-schema;textable;record` when a node produces or requires a JSON Schema — for example a schema generator, a validator configuration, or a tool that introspects API contracts. For ordinary JSON objects, use [JSON Object](https://capdag.com/browse/media:json;textable;record).

## Notes
JSON Schema documents are themselves JSON objects, so this type inherits the `record` and `textable` traits. Consumers that simply need to read or display the content may treat this as a standard [JSON Object](https://capdag.com/browse/media:json;textable;record).
